markets.question: Spread: CR Brasil (-2.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Brazil Serie B game, scheduled for April 5 at 5:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "CR Brasil" if CR Brasil win the game by 3 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Grêmio Novorizontino".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on cbf.com.br. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Grêmio Novorizontino vs. CR Brasil - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Brazil Serie B game, scheduled for April 5 at 5:00 PM ET.

markets.question: ASC Oțelul Galați vs. FK Csíkszereda Miercurea Ciuc: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming Romania SuperLiga game between ASC Oțelul Galați and FK Csíkszereda Miercurea Ciuc, scheduled for March 13 at 11:30 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both ASC Oțelul Galați and FK Csíkszereda Miercurea Ciuc each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on lpf.ro. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.description:
In the upcoming Brazil Serie B game between Grêmio Novorizontino and CR Brasil, scheduled for April 5 at 5:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Grêmio Novorizontino and CR Brasil combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.
